reservations.party: Ken Carr · Mark Lyon · Mike Fonk
reservations.note: Pre-trip dinner — first night in Vegas
reservations.address: 355 Convention Center Drive, Las Vegas NV 89109
reservations.bio: Since 1982, Piero's has been the soul of Las Vegas dining. Family-owned for over 40 years, with scenes from Casino filmed here and the kind of old-Vegas glow that still feels impossible to fake.
must_order: New York Cheesecake with Raspberry Sauce

reservations.venue: The Tavern at Fontainebleau Las Vegas
reservations.address: 2777 South Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas NV 89109
reservations.bio: Not just a sports bar — one of the top sportsbook-viewing experiences in Las Vegas, with a 180-degree video wall, panoramic HD screens, plush leather seating, and premium tournament-week energy.
reservations.parking: Complimentary valet — ask server to validate · Free self-parking for NV residents / Fontainebleau Rewards members through May 31

reservations.address: 2777 South Las Vegas Blvd, Fontainebleau Las Vegas NV 89109
reservations.bio: Chef Evan Funke built Mother Wolf as a Roman fever dream — all handmade pasta obsession, mythology, and high-style hospitality. The LA original is one of the toughest reservations in the country, and the Fontainebleau room carries that same aura.

reservations.venue: The Tavern at Fontainebleau Las Vegas
reservations.address: 2777 South Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas NV 89109
reservations.bio: The Tavern is headquarters for the trip — screens everywhere, serious game-day food, and the kind of all-day setup where you settle in early and don’t move until the slate is over.
reservations.parking: Complimentary valet — ask server to validate · Free self-parking for NV residents / Fontainebleau Rewards members through May 31
